Description: Verify successful GET request to getManageDebitCard endpoint with all mandatory parameters
Preconditions: Valid authentication token, User has necessary permissions
Test_Steps:
1. Prepare GET request to https: //{Eclipse-IP}:{Eclipse-PORT}/dep/card/v1/external/debit-card/manage
2. Include all mandatory headers: authorization, client-id, env
3. Include all mandatory body/parameters
4. Send request
Expected_Result: HTTP 200 OK response with valid response structure

Description: Verify error when authorization header is missing
Test_Steps:
1. Prepare GET request without authorization header
2. Include other mandatory headers
3. Send request
Expected_Result: HTTP 401 Unauthorized response

Description: Verify error when authorization token is invalid/expired
Test_Steps:
1. Prepare GET request
2. Include authorization header with invalid token "Bearer invalid_token_12345"
3. Send request
Expected_Result: HTTP 401 Unauthorized response
